claim_text: Monash grants website use for personal non-commercial purposes only.
quote_or_paraphrase: Terms state the site is licensed only for personal non-commercial use.
required_action: Treat Monash as non-runtime evidence source only

claim_text: Monash terms prohibit extracting website data without written permission.
quote_or_paraphrase: Terms prohibit extraction and use of data from the website without written permission.
required_action: Block Monash-derived DB/API ingestion unless licensed

claim_text: Monash terms prohibit copying/distributing/selling/modifying content without permission.
quote_or_paraphrase: Terms prohibit copying, distributing, selling, renting, modifying, publishing and creating derivatives.
required_action: Use paraphrase and links only; avoid reused text/assets

claim_text: Monash disclaimer states copyright is owned and reproduction requires written consent.
quote_or_paraphrase: Copyright in website content is owned by Monash and reuse/reproduction requires written consent.
required_action: Do not copy Monash prose/tables into repo/API

claim_text: Public Monash guidance can support internal evidence review.
quote_or_paraphrase: Public FAQ content is accessible for informational reading.
required_action: Keep Monash in internal evidence notes only

claim_text: Using Monash guidance alone to generate public cohort tags is rights-sensitive and should be treated as blocked.
quote_or_paraphrase: Because extraction and redistribution are prohibited, Monash-derived runtime tagging is blocked without license.
required_action: Use CIQUAL-derived rules for runtime tags

claim_text: CIQUAL 2025 dataset is published under Etalab Open License 2.0.
quote_or_paraphrase: Dataset page lists license and data use agreement as Etalab Open License 2.0.
required_action: Use CIQUAL as primary runtime dataset

claim_text: CIQUAL dataset page requires explicit citation to source.
quote_or_paraphrase: Citation guidance requests explicit source reference when using data.
required_action: Add mandatory source citation string

claim_text: Etalab Open License allows free reuse including commercial use.
quote_or_paraphrase: License permits free reuse of public information including commercial use.
required_action: Proceed with CIQUAL reuse under license terms

claim_text: Etalab Open License requires source attribution and update-date mention when available.
quote_or_paraphrase: License requires mention of source and date of last update for reused information.
required_action: Expose source and version/update metadata

claim_text: Etalab Open License prohibits implying endorsement and misleading reuse.
quote_or_paraphrase: License forbids suggesting official endorsement and misleading users about data/source/update.
required_action: Add non-endorsement wording and governance checks

claim_text: PubMed records show publisher copyright on guideline articles.
quote_or_paraphrase: PubMed record includes copyright statement from publisher.
required_action: Do not republish full text/tables/figures

claim_text: Publisher copyright also appears on AGA guideline publication.
quote_or_paraphrase: PubMed record includes copyright held by publisher.
required_action: Use citations and internal summaries only

claim_text: CDC materials are mostly public domain but require attribution and no implied endorsement.
publisher_or_journal: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
quote_or_paraphrase: CDC states US government works are public domain; asks citation and restricts logo/endorsement use.
required_action: Cite CDC and avoid logo use

claim_text: NICE content has explicit rights controls and international reuse may need permission.
quote_or_paraphrase: NICE terms describe licensed use and note international use outside UK scope may require agreement.
required_action: Treat NICE as internal evidence only for V1 public copy unless licensed

claim_text: Maintainer policy sets CIQUAL as the only runtime/public data basis and bans Monash-derived runtime/public rationale text in V1.
quote_or_paraphrase: Policy removes ambiguous Monash public-runtime reuse path and closes R6 for V1.
required_action: Enforce CIQUAL-only runtime/public copy basis in implementation checklist

claim_text: Maintainer policy treats NICE text as non-reusable for public copy in V1 unless explicit permission is documented.
quote_or_paraphrase: Policy removes NICE public-copy ambiguity by defaulting to non-reuse.
required_action: Block NICE textual reuse in API/docs unless legal clearance exists

claim_text: FODMAPs are short-chain carbohydrates.
quote_or_paraphrase: FAQ defines FODMAPs as short-chain carbohydrates.
required_action: Use carbohydrate-based rationale wording

claim_text: Fats and oils are generally low in FODMAPs because they contain little or no carbohydrates.
quote_or_paraphrase: FAQ states fats/oils are generally low in FODMAPs due to little/no carbohydrates.
required_action: Use 'generally low by composition' wording

claim_text: Meat, chicken, fish and eggs are generally low in FODMAPs because they contain little or no carbohydrates.
quote_or_paraphrase: FAQ states these protein foods are generally low in FODMAPs due to low carbohydrate content.
required_action: Require plain/unprocessed qualifier

claim_text: Protein foods are naturally free from FODMAPs in plain forms.
source_title: Monash High and Low FODMAP Foods
quote_or_paraphrase: High/low page says fish, meat and eggs are naturally free from FODMAPs.
required_action: Apply processing caveat and avoid absolute claims

claim_text: Food processing can alter FODMAP composition and classification.
quote_or_paraphrase: Review notes food processing can increase/decrease FODMAP composition and affect low/high status.
required_action: Keep processed variants excluded

claim_text: ACG recommends only a limited trial of low-FODMAP diet for IBS symptom improvement.
quote_or_paraphrase: Guideline issues a conditional recommendation for a limited low-FODMAP trial.
required_action: Avoid absolute medical claims

claim_text: AGA describes three low-FODMAP phases and warns against overly restrictive long-term use.
quote_or_paraphrase: Best practice advice describes restriction, reintroduction and personalization with less restrictive long-term diet.
required_action: Frame as compatible guidance not guaranteed outcomes

claim_text: NICE recommends expert-led low-FODMAP diets only after other dietary steps.
quote_or_paraphrase: Recommendation supports low-FODMAP diets only with healthcare professional expertise.
required_action: Keep non-medical and non-prescriptive messaging

claim_text: Garlic and onion FODMAP compounds are water-soluble and not fat-soluble.
quote_or_paraphrase: Monash explains fructans are water-soluble and not fat-soluble, supporting infused-oil rationale.
required_action: Allow plain infused oils only when solids removed

claim_text: Homemade garlic-in-oil mixtures must be refrigerated and discarded after 4 days.
publisher_or_journal: National Center for Home Food Preservation
quote_or_paraphrase: NCHFP warns to refrigerate homemade garlic-in-oil and discard unused portions after four days.
required_action: Include storage warning whenever infused oils are discussed

claim_text: CDC advises refrigerating homemade oils flavored with garlic or herbs and discarding after 4 days.
publisher_or_journal: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
quote_or_paraphrase: CDC advises refrigerating garlic/herb oils and discarding after four days to prevent botulism.
required_action: Mirror CDC storage guidance in caveat copy
